description: Documenso-class regression-guard. Canonical Docker build-arg-secret pattern: `ARG NEXT_PRIVATE_ENCRYPTION_KEY="CAFEBABE"` followed by `ENV NEXT_PRIVATE_ENCRYPTION_KEY="$NEXT_PRIVATE_ENCRYPTION_KEY"`. The ARG default is an obvious placeholder (CAFEBABE = well-known dummy hex). Pre-v0.17.5 config-auditor flagged the ENV line as CRITICAL because it matched the SECRET/KEY/TOKEN regex, ignoring the ARG-rebind context. Fix: skip the finding when (a) ENV value is a self-rebind `$VARNAME` AND (b) preceding ARG default is a known placeholder. config-auditor MUST NOT fire.
